sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: [H.eco Tech Festa 2026] Sustainability now a condition for market access: HP exec

Kim emphasizes that delaying sustainability investments will result in higher costs through stricter regulations, supply chain instability, and increased operational expenses.

feed.title: NetApp Collaborates with Google Cloud to Power Data Infrastructure for Distributed Cloud
